description: Objection handled: variant directly addresses the most prominent unhandled objection from the brief (setup complexity / ops burden). Expect positive delta.

brief.icp: Engineers at startups who want open-source analytics they can self-host or run in the cloud
brief.problemStatement: Engineers want control over their analytics data but worry that self-hosting means painful infrastructure ops.
brief.valueProp: Open-source analytics with a managed cloud option — you get the control without the ops burden.

unhandled: won't self-hosting take a whole sprint to set up and maintain?

input.goal: increase trial signups by handling the self-hosting ops objection

slots.subhead: Self-host for full control or use our cloud.

slots.headline: Open-source analytics — self-host in 5 minutes, or we host it for you

slots.subhead: No DevOps sprint required. Deploy with one command or let us run it — switch anytime, data stays yours.
